name: rf2-docs-cljs-playground-sci
description: re-frame2-aware SCI eval bundle for the docs/cljs playground (rf2-00zvt Phase 3). shadow-cljs :browser build that bundles re-frame2 core + reagent2 into an SCI context -> docs/cljs/playground-rf2.js (window.rf2sci.{evalString,renderLast}). Not a Scittle plugin; standalone bundle (findings doc §6 option B).
